title.en: The Breath of the Primordial Forest

description.ko: 생명과 빛이 하나가 되어 숨 쉬는 유기적 흐름을 표현하며, 살아있는 호흡 구조의 섬세한 균형을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A representation of organic flow where life and light breathe in unison, showcasing the delicate balance of a living respiratory structure.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Breath of the Primordial Forest.' A massive, semi-transparent respiratory organism woven from #7FB069 emerald moss and #2D5A3D vascular membranes, suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent mist. The entity rhythmically exhales #FFE66D golden bioluminescent spores that swirl like liquid silk in a zero-gravity environment. Macro focus on the semi-permeable membranes revealing intricate internal capillary networks of glowing sap. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, capturing a divine and serene natural atmosphere.
